name: Model D
explanation: A Minimoog-style monophonic synthesizer: three anti-aliased oscillators with per-osc octave and detune, a noise source, the classic four-pole resonant ladder filter with drive, independent filter and amplifier ADSR envelopes, and portamento glide. Play it with the keyboard, your computer keys (a–k), or MIDI.

name: Warm Lowpass
explanation: A gentle one-pole low-pass with output gain. Feed it one of the royalty-free samples, a test tone, your mic, or your own file to hear it work.

name: Saw Lead
explanation: A monophonic sawtooth lead with a soft AR envelope. Play it with the on-screen keyboard, your computer keys (a–k), or a MIDI controller.
